records.ety: [L. enumeratus, p. p. of enumerare to count out, enumerate; e out + numerare to count, fr. numerus number. See Number.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Enumerated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Enumerating (?).]

defs: To count; to tell by numbers; to count over, or tell off one after another; to number; to reckon up; to mention one by one; to name over; to make a special and separate account of; to recount; as, to enumerate the stars in a constellation.
quotes: Enumerating the services he had done.
